description_long: This is a green, knitted stuffed toy resembling a cartoonish animal, possibly a cat or a dinosaur, with a plump, rounded body and short limbs. Its face features embroidered black eyes, a pink tongue sticking out, and three black whisker lines on each cheek. The toy has a white, textured belly and white-tipped paws and tail, all crafted to mimic a hand-knitted appearance. A prominent purple bow is attached to the upper left side of its head, adding a playful accent. The back is plain green with a small, stubby tail, and the overall surface is soft and plush. The toy exudes a whimsical, friendly character, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or play areas.
description: A green, knitted stuffed animal with a white belly, purple bow, and playful embroidered face, featuring a soft, plush texture and rounded limbs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green, knitted body, white-tipped tail and paws, and the purple bow on the head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the embroidered face, pink tongue, black whiskers, white belly, and both arms and legs visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the green body, white-tipped limbs, and the purple bow from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain green back and the small, stubby tail, with the purple bow partially visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon green cat with a bow
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and cheerful, with wide, embroidered black eyes, a pink tongue sticking out, and upward-curved whisker lines that suggest a friendly demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms and legs positioned forward, and the head facing straight ahead.
